description_long: This is a two-story half-timbered commercial building with a steeply pitched, dark brown gabled roof and multiple chimneys. The facade features a combination of exposed wooden beams and light-colored plaster, with large, multi-paned windows on both floors. The ground floor includes a prominent storefront with two large display windows and a central entrance, flanked by decorative wooden columns. Painted signage above the entrance reads 'CHEMISERIE CHOLETTE', and scenic murals are visible beneath the windows. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and less ornamentation, while the roof includes skylights and multiple intersecting gables. The overall appearance suggests a historic European architectural style, likely from the late medieval or early modern period.
description: A historic, half-timbered clothing store with a steep gabled roof, large display windows, and decorative signage. The facade features exposed wooden beams, plaster panels, and scenic murals.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate half-timbered facade, two large display windows, central entrance, and prominent signage above the door.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the steep, dark brown gabled roof with chimneys and skylights, and minimal detail on the side wall.
description_view_2: Angled side view revealing additional windows, intersecting rooflines, and the continuation of the half-timbered design.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the roof structure, chimneys, and plain back wall with limited windows and no storefront features.
attribute_storefront_signage: Painted sign above the entrance reads 'CHEMISERIE CHOLETTE' in white letters on a dark background, with scenic murals below the windows.
attribute_display_windows: Two large rectangular display windows on the ground floor, flanking the central entrance, with scenic murals beneath.
